rationale_source: F2.DH asymmetric-gate edge (R10-F): minor discrepancy below 30% threshold should NOT activate hold; broker_correction tier still wins for canonical resolution

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Broker correction $290k; loan_app $280k. Discrepancy = 3.6% from broker, below 30% R11-B-1 Layer 1 threshold. F1.LA broker_correction wins; loan_app NOT suppressed (small delta).

discrepancyHold.rationale: Minor discrepancy (<30%) does NOT activate F2.DH per R10-F asymmetric-gate threshold semantics.

must_include.rationale: Final corrected loan_amount per F1.LA broker_correction.
